title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 - 12 - 18: Organizing home to Exercise Stream

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about setting up a streaming and exercise system in his Boulder home. He discusses acquiring OBS software, an Elgato stream deck, a Wahoo KICKR (watt bike), and an electric bike, with plans to stream himself working and cycling simultaneously. He also talks about organizing his home to fit more bikes and improving his personal website with fitness tracking.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: ideal multitasking — the future of how to work
useful for climbing hills and riding with visitors; interesting to experiment with vs road bike fitness
wants it looking good but anxious about it being embarrassing before he has time to improve it

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I usually do a video like once a week.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm kind of high right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been getting lots of new technology and stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I found out about streaming and got OBS (Open Broadcaster Software).

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Somebody told me about OBS right when I was streaming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got OBS where you can do all of the editing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's kind of like being a radio star, only now you're a video guy live.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I found out about the Elgato Stream Deck, which I ordered on Amazon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: On Friday is when I really get into streaming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Streaming while biking is the ultimate multitasking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do multitasking while streaming, like working on my computer while biking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll use a small keyboard on the side of my bike to switch programs like Dreamweaver.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll have a green screen behind me while streaming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to have Zwift on one corner of the stream to show my watts, speed, and heart rate.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can work on my website while streaming and switch to other tasks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to get back into shape by doing different sports like rowing and triathlon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'd like to get a mountain bike, cyclocross bike, and gravel bike someday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have a road bike and an electric bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got the electric bike so my aunt can ride with me when she visits.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I set the electric bike to the same size as my road bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The electric bike has a governor limiting its speed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought the electric bike wouldn't have a governor and could go 40 mph on flats.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The electric bike feels like someone is pushing you as hard as they can with each pedal stroke.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The electric bike's booklet says it maxes out at 250 watts, but the app showed 453 watts (possibly including my effort).

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm organizing my room to fit more bikes and hang stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to hook up my Garmin computer and watt pedals to my bike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to figure out how to use a green screen in OBS.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to improve my website and add a blog page tracking my daily miles and activities.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to make videos of the books I listen to while biking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hope improving my website won't be too stressful.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll have time to rest and improve my website little by little.
